earlyCheckIn: Early check-in from 11:00 AM is available on request, subject to availability. A half-day rate may apply.
lateCheckOut: Late check-out until 2:00 PM is available on request, subject to availability. A half-day rate may apply.

rules.title: Quiet Hours
rules.description: Quiet hours are observed between 10:00 PM and 7:00 AM. We ask that all guests be mindful of other guests during this time.

rules.title: No Smoking Indoors
rules.description: Smoking is strictly prohibited in all indoor areas, including rooms, corridors, and the lobby. Designated outdoor smoking areas are available.

rules.title: Pet Policy
rules.description: Pets are welcomed at the discretion of management. Please notify us in advance of your arrival. A refundable pet deposit may be required.

rules.title: ID & Payment
rules.description: A valid government-issued ID and a credit card are required at check-in. Payment is due in full upon arrival unless prior arrangements have been made.

rules.title: Cancellation
rules.description: Cancellations made more than 48 hours before arrival incur no charge. Cancellations within 48 hours of arrival are subject to a one-night charge.

rules.title: Children
rules.description: Children of all ages are welcome. Children under 12 stay free when sharing an existing bed with parents. Cots are available on request at no charge.
